creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text: While there, I suggest to remove #ifdef ICMPV6CTL_ND6_DRLIST and the whole #else branch from rtrlist(), and #ifdef ICMPV6CTL_ND6_PRLIST and the #else branch from plist(). Those sysctls have been available for 14 years and the #else code has suffered bit rot and doesn't compile any longer.
